name: Savory Chili with Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium flame.
2. Add garlic, onion, celery, and parsley. Cook and stir for 5-6 minutes.
3. Add ground beef to the pot. Continue cooking and stirring until browned.
4. Drain the meat well, reserving the pan drippings.
5. Return the reserved drippings to the meat mixture and discard the rest of the fat.
6. Stir in tomato paste, tomato sauce, water, chile powder, salt, and pepper.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 60-90 minutes.
8. Add beans and continue simmering for an additional 10-15 minutes until heated through.
9. Serve hot, garnished with grated jack cheese.
